creator: cartola@cartola.org
text:
Hi,

I've installed graphics/hugin recently on a FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE #0 r286666. I did it using pkg install hugin. It installed many dependencies, but when I run hugin after it said something was missing. Then I've installed and another missing thing appeared. After all I've had to install: 

pkg install boost-libs-1.55.0_10
pkg install libpano13-2.9.19_1
pkg install glew-1.13.0
pkg install exiv2-0.24_2,1
pkg install lcms2-2.7_2
pkg install wx28-gtk2-2.8.12_6
pkg install sqlite3-3.11.1

I've reported the package mantainer (greg/grog) and he couldn't find the problem. The port install everything but the package doesn't. I don't know if the problem is in the port framework, package generation or the individual port.

I also don't know if it happens with other packages. I have installed hugin as a first package in a fresh installed system.
